description_long: This helmet features a highly ornate and sculpted design, reminiscent of historical or ceremonial armor. The front displays a pronounced, beak-like nose guard and exaggerated facial features, including raised eyebrows and a stylized mustache, giving it a fierce, almost theatrical appearance. The dome of the helmet is ribbed with evenly spaced ridges running from front to back, and is adorned with small, rounded studs and decorative rosettes on the sides. The lower edge of the helmet is scalloped and also decorated with geometric patterns and additional studs. The surface appears metallic, with a matte, slightly weathered finish, suggesting it is made from steel or iron. There are no visible openings for ventilation, and the interior is likely hollow to accommodate a human head.
description: An ornate, ribbed metal helmet with sculpted facial features, decorative studs, and a matte metallic finish. The design is theatrical and historical, with no visible ventilation or modern features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet's sculpted face, prominent nose guard, and detailed mustache, with decorative studs and geometric patterns along the lower edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the ribbed dome, decorative rosette, and the profile of the exaggerated facial features, as well as the distribution of studs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full ribbed structure of the dome, the central ridge, and the symmetrical placement of decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the ribbed dome, rosette, and the side profile of the sculpted face and studs.
